text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while training with Mejiro Dober...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Aha! So this is where you two were!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Tazuna? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I came here to deliver good news! The thing is,
because of how well you did during your classic
year...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The URA has selected you as the classic-year
Goddess! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The title of Goddess is awarded to those who run
in races like the Hanshin J.F., Triple Tiara, and
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The accolade is awarded to one racer in each
year: junior, classic, and senior. It's a huge honor
for Mejiro Dober to be selected to represent her
year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Me? I'm the classic-year Goddess!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! ♪ The award ceremony is going
to be held in a few days, so don't forget to
prepare a speech!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you'd better help me prepare my speech
after training today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you'd better help me prepare my speech
after training today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the day of the award ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the day of the award ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's hear a word from this year's
classic-year Goddess, Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober stands tall onstage, meeting the
wave of applause and flashing cameras with pride.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to express my sincere gratitude for being
chosen as the recipient of such a magnificent
award.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Moving forward, I hope my performance
continues to live up to this achievement...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I'll do my best so I can stand on this stage
once again during my senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hall erupts with renewed applause and
admiring murmurs at Mejiro Dober's words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I think I might have oversold myself...
choice_data_list: I thought it was pretty cool of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I wasn't trying to be cool! I just wanted to make
my determination clear to everyone...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
C-cool?! Me?! I was just trying to make my
determination clear to everyone! Oh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can't exactly take those words back... Just help
me make them come true, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can't take them back, so I have to make those
words a reality now. Let's do our best, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's growth is evident to everyone as
the award ceremony comes to an end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's growth is evident to everyone as
the award ceremony comes to an end!
